community.name: apple-m3-max
community.notes: Apple M3 Max (30-core GPU, 36 GB unified), macOS arm64, llama.cpp b9430 (brew), Qwen2.5-Coder-7B Q4_K_M, 8K ctx. Cooldown methodology (45s between configs) to avoid laptop thermal throttling. tok/s: f16 54.1, q8_0 50.0, q4_0 31.2. Key Apple-Silicon difference vs CUDA: on Metal, q4_0 KV cache costs ~42% throughput (54->31), whereas on the RTX 5060 Ti q4_0 had NO speed penalty (only the quality collapse). q8_0 is the clear sweet spot: ~8% slower, minimal quality loss. VRAM not reported: unified memory isn't comparable to discrete VRAM.
